name: Nextcloud Attachments
author: Bulwark Mail Community
description: Attach large files via a Nextcloud share link instead of as binary attachments. Files are uploaded to a configured Nextcloud server and a public share link is inserted into the outgoing message at send time.

sizeThreshold.label: Cloud-attach threshold (bytes)
sizeThreshold.description: Files above this size trigger a hint suggesting Nextcloud cloud attach. Default 10 MB.

nudgeOnLargeUpload.label: Suggest cloud attach for large files
nudgeOnLargeUpload.description: Show a toast hint when a regular attachment exceeds the threshold above.

expiryDays.label: Share expiry (days)
expiryDays.description: Number of days the public share link stays valid. 0 disables expiry.

passwordProtect.label: Password-protect share links
passwordProtect.description: Generate a random password for each share. The password is shown next to the link in the email body so the recipient can copy it.
